sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime, description String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'München', 100.0, now(), 'Beautiful city'), (2, 'Paris', NULL, now(), 'City of Love');
SELECT id, punycodeEncode(name) + ' - ' + CAST(value AS String) AS encoded_name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, punycodeEncode('Example: ' + description) AS encoded_description FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > 50);
SELECT id, punycodeEncode('Combined: ' + name) + ' has value: ' + toString(value) AS combined_info FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING value < 200.0;
SELECT name, punycodeEncode(name) + ' Total: ' + toString(SUM(value)) AS summary FROM test_table GROUP BY name ORDER BY summary DESC;
SELECT id, punycodeEncode(NULLIF(name, '')) AS encoded_name FROM test_table WHERE created_at > toDateTime('2021-01-01 00:00:00') ORDER BY encoded_name;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, punycodeEncode(name) AS fn_name FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, a + b AS total FROM (SELECT id, punycodeEncode(name) AS a, value AS b FROM test_table) WHERE total IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, punycodeEncode(a.name + ' - ' + b.name) AS combined_name FROM test_table AS a JOIN test_table AS b ON a.id != b.id WHERE a.value > 50 AND b.value < 200;
